basic_details.job_title: DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on the official website, dhsgsu.edu.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates up to 28 years of age (age relaxation up to 5 years for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PH and female candidates) holding an M.Sc. in Botany, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Life Science, Microbiology, or Plant Biotechnology with 55% marks and above are eligible to apply through email on or before 04-08-2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application det

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 28 years (relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PH and female candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Botany/ Biochemistry / Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Microbiology/ Plant Biotechnology (with 55% and above)
qualification.details: M.Sc. Botany/ Biochemistry /Biotechnology/ Life Science/Microbiology/ Plant Biotechnology (with 55% and above) Candidates with experience in the relevant research work will be given preference.

salary_details.details: Consolidated fellowship of ₹20,000/- per month for a period of two years.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview (offline/online). Candidates must bring their original documents on the day of the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DGSGSU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview (offline/online). Candidates must bring their original documents on the day of the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar is 04-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed M.Sc. in Botany, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Life Science, Microbiology, or Plant Biotechnology with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation of up to 5 years is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PH and female candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated fellowship of ₹20,000/- per month for a period of two years.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DGSGSU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their application along with a detailed CV and self-attested documents via email to the provided address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 3623-CST/R&D(Biosci/SVTKA)/2026/129.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) role?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview, which can be conducted offline or online. Original documents must be presented on the interview day.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is recruiting for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is being conducted by the Department of Botany at Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Sagar.
